channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Smash those PBs for less — these 11+ Prime Day Garmin deals take up to 57% off Fenix, Forerunner, Venu and more
item.description: Amazon Prime Day is here and the retailer has discounted a wide range of Garmin products, including record-low prices on top-rated wearables and dashcams.

item.title: Google will now count all Android backup data toward your storage cap
item.description: Fortunately, it shouldn't take too much extra space.

item.title: Stop overspending on tech — these 30+ Amazon Prime Day deals under AU$100 offer exceptional bang-for-buck
item.description: We’ve rounded up the best Amazon Prime Day deals under AU$100 we’d actually buy, and you can grab big discounts on favourites like speakers, power banks, fitness trackers and more.

item.title: I'm and audio expert and these are the 16 Prime Day headphone deals I recommend for any music fan
item.description: With models to suit all styles and all budgets, Prime Day is a prime time to upgrade your audio.

item.title: Mint Mobile just brought back a classic deal — you can get a full year of unlimited data for just $180 right now
item.description: Looking to switch up your plan to something more economical? Mint Mobile's latest deal gets you a full year of unlimited data for just $15/mo.

item.title: Stop starting every ChatGPT conversation from scratch — this one habit saves me time every week
item.description: Most people start every ChatGPT conversation from zero. Here’s how to work smart.

item.title: I'm a coffee machine expert and these 20+ Prime Day deals on models of all styles get my full recommendation
item.description: The annual Amazon sale can often be relied upon for excellent savings on a huge range of coffee machines, and this year's sale is no different.

item.title: I'm a floor-care expert and these are the best Prime Day vacuum cleaner deals I recommend for Aussie homes
item.description: Now that Prime Day 2026 is here, there are some record-low discounts on top-rated vacuum cleaners of all kinds — from stick vacs to robovacs, even corded or handheld.

item.title: Geekom GeekBook X16 Pro review: A business laptop offering older but still potent Intel hardware to those working to a budget
item.description: The Geekom GeekBook X16 Pro is a large laptop that leverages an older 100-series Core Ultra processor and LPDDR5X memory.

item.title: How to watch USA vs Belgium: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-Off time as FIFA World Cup 2026 co-hosts eye quarter-final place
item.description: Here's how to watch USA vs Belgium for free online and from anywhere in the FIFA World Cup 2026 last 16, with Folarin Balogun set to feature for the co-hosts.

item.title: 95+ outstanding Amazon Prime Day discounts, vetted by deal experts: from headphones to e-readers, appliances & much more
item.description: Amazon's biggest sale of the year is here with some of the best prices we've seen on Kindles, AirPods, vacuums, hairstylers and more.

item.title: Microsoft layoffs: Read the email Xbox CEO Asha Sharma sent employees
item.description: Xbox was hit the hardest, with 1,600 roles eliminated today and 3,200 more to be impacted throughout the next year. Last month, there were murmurs that “major job cuts” were coming for Xbox.

item.title: Hoto’s PixelDrive screwdriver is down to $60, matching its best price
item.description: If your Prime Day purchases included a new desk, TV stand, bookshelf, or other furniture you still haven’t assembled, Hoto’s PixelDrive cordless screwdriver can help speed up the process. It’s currently on sale for $59.99 ($20 off) at Amazon, matching its best price to date. From tightening loose screws on furniture to repairing electronics, the […]...
